equity.label: S&P 500 equity signal
equity.note: A 5-session drawdown adds pressure. A 5-session rally adds relief and can partially offset the composite score.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2025-08-21 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 24.80
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-08-21: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 24.80/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and equity signal shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-08-21, the score printed 24.80/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and equity signal doing most of the work.
